title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: cockpit bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for cockpit is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Cockpit enables users to administer GNU/Linux servers using a web browser. It offers network configuration, log inspection, diagnostic reports, SELinux troubleshooting, interactive command-line sessions, and more.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Cockpit networking tab goes blank [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-131244)  [Network] Bridge rename not working as expected [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-131249)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
full_text:
An update for cockpit is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Cockpit enables users to administer GNU/Linux servers using a web browser. It offers network configuration, log inspection, diagnostic reports, SELinux troubleshooting, interactive command-line sessions, and more.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Cockpit networking tab goes blank [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-131244)  [Network] Bridge rename not working as expected [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-131249)
